# prompt-prefixes

## Installation

Install dependencies:

```bash
$ npm install
$ npm run build
```

## Usage

Start the server:

```
% yarn start
```

Mixed prompts and plain commands:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/example/repo.git
cd repo
$ npm install
```

## Configuration

Set up environment variables:

```bash
$ export NODE_ENV=production
$HOME/bin/setup
PORT=3000 npm start
```
